description: Style NoteThe luxe comfort and rugged styling of gliders' shoes are now replicated in its floaters as well. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.  Product DetailsRound toed olive green and yellow floaters, has velcro closures on the forefoot, midfoot and backfootSynthetic upper, forefoot and midfoot velcro closures are connected by a side strap which loops around to connect with the velcro strap at the backfootLight weight curved footbed with groovesTPU outsole with an upraised heel, arched midfoot, diamond shaped grooves and comes with a carry bagMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when required
